title: EKG Technician
description: Support our cardiology team at Johns Hopkins Medicine by performing electrocardiograms and cardiac monitoring procedures with precision and care.
responsibilities: Perform 12-lead ECG procedures and cardiac stress tests
Operate telemetry monitoring systems and interpret basic rhythms
Prepare patients, explain procedures, and ensure comfort
Maintain equipment calibration and troubleshoot technical issues
Document findings and communicate abnormalities to clinical staff
Maintain patient confidentiality and follow infection control protocols

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Flexible time off and work arrangements
